OperatorAction: Open the live homepage and confirm the CRM, Operations, Tools, Projects In Flight cards and embedded attention queues are understandable.
Acceptance: Adam can identify the CRM Command Center as the single daily CRM door without using the older reference pages.

TargetSurface: Guided AI Labs - Intake Register / Attention Now
OperatorAction: Create or identify one internal test intake row labelled with the walkthrough record prefix.
ExpectedRecord: Internal intake signal with owner, status, next action, and durable note
EvidenceTarget: Intake row link or browser note
Acceptance: The signal appears in the intake queue and has a clear next action.

OperatorAction: Create a qualification row linked to the internal scenario and choose a recommended package.
ExpectedRecord: Qualification row with status, fit score, urgency, recommended package, owner, and next action due date
EvidenceTarget: Qualification row link or browser note
Acceptance: The row appears in Qualification Triage until qualified, disqualified, nurture, or converted.

TargetSurface: CRM - Organizations, Contacts, Engagements, Stakeholder Map, Touchpoints
OperatorAction: Create the minimum internal organization/contact/engagement/touchpoint records required to represent the scenario.
ExpectedRecord: Organization, contact, engagement, stakeholder role, and first touchpoint records with RecordKey/CentralOSLink/GraphNodeId left blank or clearly placeholder
EvidenceTarget: CRM record links or browser notes
Acceptance: The engagement carries entry package, target package, engagement stage, execution stage, owner, next action, and migration hooks.

SourceSurface: Decision Register and CRM - Action Queue
TargetSurface: Decision Register, CRM - Action Queue, Agent Action Log
OperatorAction: If the scenario requires an internal operating decision, record it; then create one action queue item and one agent/evidence log note.
ExpectedRecord: Decision row only if there is a real internal decision; action queue row with due date and owner; Agent Action Log evidence
Acceptance: The action appears in Open CRM Actions and any decision has an explicit rationale.

SourceSurface: Active Delivery page and Planner/List operating surfaces
TargetSurface: CRM - Action Queue, Lifecycle Checklist, Handoff Packet Register
OperatorAction: Confirm the scenario can move from qualified/onboarding into active delivery without losing owner, status, blockers, or evidence.
ExpectedRecord: Lifecycle checklist item or delivery action with owner, blocker state, and evidence requirement
EvidenceTarget: Checklist/action/handoff packet link or browser note
Acceptance: A future staff member can see what must happen next without asking where the record lives.

SourceSurface: CRM - Artifacts / Handoff Evidence and Client Handoff Packets
TargetSurface: CRM - Artifacts, Handoff Packet Register, Readiness Evidence
OperatorAction: Record a harmless placeholder evidence artifact and confirm it shows in the handoff/evidence queues.
ExpectedRecord: Artifact or handoff packet row labelled internal walkthrough, with no public/client sharing
Acceptance: The operating path ends with a durable evidence pointer and no external exposure.
